name: Deep Dish Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Juice the peaches and mix the juice with the sugar, salt, nutmeg, cinnamon, and flour.
2. Add to the peaches until evenly coated.
3. Spread in a 1 1/2 quart baking dish. Dot with butter.
4. Roll out pastry and cover the dish, leaving a 1 1/2 inch overhang.
5. Press the pastry along the edge of the dish and flute it.
6. Cut three vents in the top. Sprinkle with remaining sugar.
7. Bake at 450 degrees for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake for 30 more minutes.
8. Serve with whipped cream. Makes 1 pie.
